set -euo pipefail

source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/buc_command.sh"
source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/buym_yelp.sh"

zrbld_furnish() {
  buc_doc_env "BURD_BUK_DIR          " "BUK module directory (dispatch-provided)"
  buc_doc_env "BURD_TEMP_DIR         " "Bash Dispatch Utility provided temporary directory, empty at start of command"
  buc_doc_env "BURD_NOW_STAMP        " "Bash Dispatch Utility provided string unique between invocations"
  buc_doc_env_done || return 0

  local z_rbk_kit_dir="${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}"
  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/buf_fact.sh"
  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/buv_validation.sh"
  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/burd_regime.sh"
  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbcc_Constants.sh"
  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbgc_Constants.sh"
  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbgl_GarLayout.sh"
  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbgd_DepotConstants.sh"
  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbrr_regime.sh"
  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbrd_regime.sh"
  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbdc_DerivedConstants.sh"

  source "${RBCC_rbrd_file}"

  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbuh_Http.sh"
  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbge_Rest.sh"
  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rba_Auth.sh"
  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbldk_Kindle.sh"
  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbndb_base.sh"
  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/buz_zipper.sh"
  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbz_zipper.sh"

  zbuv_kindle

  buc_log_args 'Validate BUD environment'
  zburd_kindle

  zrbcc_kindle

  zrbrr_kindle
  zrbrd_kindle
  zrbrr_enforce
  zrbrd_enforce
  zrbdc_kindle

  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbrv_regime.sh"

  buc_log_args 'Kindle modules in dependency order'
  zrbgc_kindle
  zrbgl_kindle
  zrbgd_kindle
  zrbgo_kindle
  zrbuh_kindle
  zrbge_kindle
  zrba_kindle
  zrbfc_kindle
  zrbld_kindle
  zrbndb_kindle

  zbuz_kindle
  zrbz_kindle
}

buc_execute rbld_ "Recipe Bottle Lode" zrbld_furnish "$@"

65	  readonly ZRBFC_BUILD_STATUS_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfc_build_status.json"
66	  readonly ZRBFC_BUILD_START_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfc_build_start.txt"
67	  readonly ZRBFC_BUILD_FINISH_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfc_build_finish.txt"
68	
69	  buc_log_args 'Per-poll-attempt temp file prefixes (suffixed by poll counter for forensics)'
70	  readonly ZRBFC_POLL_RESPONSE_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfc_poll_response_"
71	  readonly ZRBFC_POLL_CODE_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfc_poll_code_"
72	  readonly ZRBFC_POLL_STDERR_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfc_poll_stderr_"
73	  readonly ZRBFC_POLL_ERR_CHECK_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfc_poll_err_check_"
74	  readonly ZRBFC_POLL_STATUS_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfc_poll_status_"
75	
76	  buc_log_args 'Define git info file (used by stitch)'
77	  readonly ZRBFC_GIT_INFO_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfc_git_info.json"
78	
79	  buc_log_args 'Define git metadata files (shared across about/mirror submissions)'
80	  readonly ZRBFC_GIT_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfc_git_"
81	  readonly ZRBFC_GIT_COMMIT_FILE="${ZRBFC_GIT_PREFIX}commit.txt"
82	  readonly ZRBFC_GIT_BRANCH_FILE="${ZRBFC_GIT_PREFIX}branch.txt"
83	  readonly ZRBFC_GIT_REPO_FILE="${ZRBFC_GIT_PREFIX}repo.txt"
84	
85	  buc_log_args 'Vessel-related files'
86	  readonly ZRBFC_VESSEL_SIGIL_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfc_vessel_sigil.txt"
87	  readonly ZRBFC_VESSEL_RESOLVED_DIR_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfc_vessel_resolved_dir.txt"
88	
89	  buc_log_args 'Define output files (BURD_OUTPUT_DIR — persists after dispatch)'
90	  readonly ZRBFC_OUTPUT_VESSEL_DIR="${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}/rbfc_vessel_dir.txt"
91	
92	  buc_log_args 'Scratch file for sequential temp-file patterns'
93	  readonly ZRBFC_SCRATCH_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfc_scratch.txt"
94	
95	  buc_log_args 'GAR package enumeration output (zrbfc_list_packages_capture)'
96	  readonly ZRBFC_PACKAGE_LIST_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfc_package_list.txt"
97	
98	  buc_log_args 'Step script directories (used by shared about/vouch/preflight assembly)'
99	  local z_self_dir="${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}"
100	  readonly ZRBFC_RBGJA_STEPS_DIR="${z_self_dir}/rbgja"
101	  test -d "${ZRBFC_RBGJA_STEPS_DIR}" || buc_die "RBGJA steps directory not found: ${ZRBFC_RBGJA_STEPS_DIR}"
102	  readonly ZRBFC_RBGJV_STEPS_DIR="${z_self_dir}/rbgjv"
103	  test -d "${ZRBFC_RBGJV_STEPS_DIR}" || buc_die "RBGJV steps directory not found: ${ZRBFC_RBGJV_STEPS_DIR}"
104	  readonly ZRBFC_RBGJR_STEPS_DIR="${z_self_dir}/rbgjr"
105	  test -d "${ZRBFC_RBGJR_STEPS_DIR}" || buc_die "RBGJR steps directory not found: ${ZRBFC_RBGJR_STEPS_DIR}"
106	
107	  buc_log_args 'Tool image refs — mutable kindle state, populated by zrbfc_resolve_tool_images'
108	  z_rbfc_tool_gcloud=""
109	  z_rbfc_tool_docker=""
110	  z_rbfc_tool_alpine=""
111	  z_rbfc_tool_syft=""
112	  z_rbfc_tool_binfmt=""
113	  z_rbfc_tool_skopeo=""
114	
115	  # Foundry build LRO poll policy — host-side wait_build_completion governance.
116	  # Each *_CEILING is the per-build-kind poll budget (wall clock = ceiling ×
117	  # INTERVAL_SEC). RETRY_TOLERANCE absorbs transient curl/empty-response
118	  # glitches before declaring the poll fatal. Distinct from the pool-build
119	  # policy in rbgp (ZRBGP_POOL_BUILD_POLL_*) — foundry builds carry user
120	  # payload; pool builds are diagnostic.
121	  readonly ZRBFC_BUILD_POLL_INTERVAL_SEC=5
122	  readonly ZRBFC_BUILD_POLL_RETRY_TOLERANCE=3
123	  readonly ZRBFC_BUILD_POLL_CEILING_INSCRIBE=120
124	  readonly ZRBFC_BUILD_POLL_CEILING_ENSHRINE=50
125	  readonly ZRBFC_BUILD_POLL_CEILING_CONJURE=960
126	  readonly ZRBFC_BUILD_POLL_CEILING_MIRROR=100
127	  readonly ZRBFC_BUILD_POLL_CEILING_ABOUT_VOUCH=100
128	  readonly ZRBFC_BUILD_POLL_CEILING_ABOUT=50
129	  readonly ZRBFC_BUILD_POLL_CEILING_VOUCH=50
130	
131	  readonly ZRBFC_KINDLED=1
132	}

134	zrbfc_sentinel() {
135	  test "${ZRBFC_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbfc not kindled - call zrbfc_kindle first"
136	}

138	# Internal: Resolve tool image references from reliquary.
139	# Must be called after vessel load (reads RBRV_RELIQUARY).
140	# Sets module-level z_rbfc_tool_* mutable kindle state for downstream step assembly.
141	# Idempotent — safe to call multiple times per invocation.
142	zrbfc_resolve_tool_images() {
143	  zrbfc_sentinel
144	
145	  local -r z_reliquary="${RBRV_RELIQUARY:-}"
146	  test -n "${z_reliquary}" \
147	    || buc_die "RBRV_RELIQUARY is required — run inscribe to create a reliquary first"
148	
149	  local -r z_rqy_prefix="${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_HOST}/${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_PATH}/${RBGL_RELIQUARIES_ROOT}/${z_reliquary}"
150	  z_rbfc_tool_gcloud="${z_rqy_prefix}/${RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_GCLOUD}:${z_reliquary}"
151	  z_rbfc_tool_docker="${z_rqy_prefix}/${RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_DOCKER}:${z_reliquary}"
152	  z_rbfc_tool_alpine="${z_rqy_prefix}/${RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_ALPINE}:${z_reliquary}"
153	  z_rbfc_tool_syft="${z_rqy_prefix}/${RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_SYFT}:${z_reliquary}"
154	  z_rbfc_tool_binfmt="${z_rqy_prefix}/${RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_BINFMT}:${z_reliquary}"
155	  z_rbfc_tool_skopeo="${z_rqy_prefix}/${RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_SKOPEO}:${z_reliquary}"
156	  buc_log_args "Tool images resolved from reliquary: ${z_reliquary}"
157	}

159	# Validate that a vessel sigil is non-empty and corresponds to a known vessel.
160	# On missing or invalid sigil, lists available vessels and dies.
161	# Does NOT resolve to a directory — use zrbfc_resolve_vessel for that.
162	rbfc_require_vessel_sigil() {
163	  zrbfc_sentinel
164	
165	  local -r z_sigil="${1:-}"
166	
167	  if test -n "${z_sigil}" && test -d "${RBRR_VESSEL_DIR}/${z_sigil}" && test -f "${RBRR_VESSEL_DIR}/${z_sigil}/rbrv.env"; then
168	    return 0
169	  fi
170	
171	  local z_sigils=""
172	  z_sigils=$(rbrv_list_capture) || buc_die "No vessels found"
173	  buc_step "Available vessels:"
174	  local z_s=""
175	  for z_s in ${z_sigils}; do
176	    buc_bare "        ${z_s}"
177	  done
178	  if test -z "${z_sigil}"; then
179	    buc_die "Vessel parameter required"
180	  fi
181	  buc_die "Vessel not found: ${z_sigil}"
182	}
183	
184	# Resolve vessel argument: accepts a sigil (e.g., rbev-sentry-deb-tether) or a path
185	# (e.g., rbmv_vessels/rbev-sentry-deb-tether).  On no-arg or invalid arg, lists
186	# available vessels and dies.  On success, writes resolved path to ZRBFC_VESSEL_RESOLVED_DIR_FILE.
187	zrbfc_resolve_vessel() {
188	  zrbfc_sentinel
189	
190	  local -r z_arg="${1:-}"
191	
192	  # Try as path first, then as sigil under RBRR_VESSEL_DIR
193	  if test -n "${z_arg}" && test -d "${z_arg}" && test -f "${z_arg}/rbrv.env"; then
194	    printf '%s' "${z_arg}" > "${ZRBFC_VESSEL_RESOLVED_DIR_FILE}" \
195	      || buc_die "Failed to write resolved vessel path"
196	    return 0
197	  fi
198	  if test -n "${z_arg}" && test -d "${RBRR_VESSEL_DIR}/${z_arg}" && test -f "${RBRR_VESSEL_DIR}/${z_arg}/rbrv.env"; then
199	    printf '%s' "${RBRR_VESSEL_DIR}/${z_arg}" > "${ZRBFC_VESSEL_RESOLVED_DIR_FILE}" \
200	      || buc_die "Failed to write resolved vessel path"
201	    return 0
202	  fi
203	
204	  # Resolution failed — list available vessels and die
205	  local z_sigils=""
206	  z_sigils=$(rbrv_list_capture) || buc_die "No vessels found"
207	  buc_step "Available vessels:"
208	  local z_sigil=""
209	  for z_sigil in ${z_sigils}; do
210	    buc_bare "        ${z_sigil}"
211	  done
212	  if test -z "${z_arg}"; then
213	    buc_die "Vessel argument required (sigil or path)"
214	  fi
215	  buc_die "Vessel not found: ${z_arg}"
216	}

218	zrbfc_load_vessel() {
219	  zrbfc_sentinel
220	
221	  local z_vessel_dir="$1"
222	
223	  buc_log_args 'Validate vessel directory exists'
224	  test -d "${z_vessel_dir}" || buc_die "Vessel directory not found: ${z_vessel_dir}"
225	
226	  buc_log_args 'Check for rbrv.env file'
227	  local z_vessel_env="${z_vessel_dir}/rbrv.env"
228	  test -f "${z_vessel_env}" || buc_die "Vessel configuration not found: ${z_vessel_env}"
229	
230	  buc_log_args 'Source vessel configuration'
231	  source "${z_vessel_env}" || buc_die "Failed to source vessel config: ${z_vessel_env}"
232	
233	  buc_log_args 'Validate vessel directory matches sigil'
234	  local z_vessel_dir_clean="${z_vessel_dir%/}"  # Strip any trailing slash
235	  local z_dir_name="${z_vessel_dir_clean##*/}"  # Extract directory name
236	  buc_log_args "  z_vessel_dir = ${z_vessel_dir}"
237	  buc_log_args "  z_dir_name   = ${z_dir_name}"
238	  test "${z_dir_name}" = "${RBRV_SIGIL}" || buc_die "Vessel sigil '${RBRV_SIGIL}' does not match directory name '${z_dir_name}'"
239	
240	  buc_log_args 'Validate vessel path matches expected pattern'
241	  local z_expected_vessel_dir="${RBRR_VESSEL_DIR}/${RBRV_SIGIL}"
242	  local z_vessel_realpath=""
243	  z_vessel_realpath=$(cd "${z_vessel_dir}" && pwd) || buc_die "Failed to resolve vessel directory path"
244	  local z_expected_realpath=""
245	  z_expected_realpath=$(cd "${z_expected_vessel_dir}" && pwd) || buc_die "Failed to resolve expected vessel path"
246	  test "${z_vessel_realpath}" = "${z_expected_realpath}" || buc_die "Vessel directory '${z_vessel_dir}' does not match expected location '${z_expected_vessel_dir}'"
247	
248	  buc_log_args 'Store loaded vessel info for use by commands'
249	  echo "${RBRV_SIGIL}" > "${ZRBFC_VESSEL_SIGIL_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to store vessel sigil"
250	
251	  buc_info "Loaded vessel: ${RBRV_SIGIL}"
252	}

254	# Internal: assemble about step scripts into JSON array file
255	# Args: output_file temp_prefix
256	# Reads ZRBFC_RBGJA_STEPS_DIR and z_rbfc_tool_* image refs from module state
257	zrbfc_assemble_about_steps() {
258	  zrbfc_sentinel
259	
260	  local -r z_output_file="$1"
261	  local -r z_temp_prefix="$2"
262	
263	  # Step definitions: script|builder|entrypoint|id
264	  # Delimiter is | because image refs contain colons (sha256 digests)
265	  local -r z_about_step_defs=(
266	    "rbgja01-discover-platforms.py|${z_rbfc_tool_gcloud}|python3|discover-platforms"
267	    "rbgja02-syft-per-platform.sh|${z_rbfc_tool_docker}|bash|syft-per-platform"
268	    "rbgja03-build-info-per-platform.py|${z_rbfc_tool_gcloud}|python3|build-info-per-platform"
269	    "rbgja04-assemble-push-about.sh|${z_rbfc_tool_docker}|bash|assemble-push-about"
270	  )
271	
272	  echo "[]" > "${z_output_file}" || buc_die "Failed to initialize about steps JSON"
273	
274	  local z_adef=""
275	  local z_ascript=""
276	  local z_abuilder=""
277	  local z_aentrypoint=""
278	  local z_aid=""
279	  local z_ascript_path=""
280	  local z_abody_file=""
281	  local z_aescaped_file=""
282	  local z_asteps_file=""
283	  local z_abody=""
284	  local z_ashebang=""
285	
286	  for z_adef in "${z_about_step_defs[@]}"; do
287	    IFS='|' read -r z_ascript z_abuilder z_aentrypoint z_aid <<< "${z_adef}"
288	    z_ascript_path="${ZRBFC_RBGJA_STEPS_DIR}/${z_ascript}"
289	    z_abody_file="${z_temp_prefix}${z_aid}_body.txt"
290	    z_aescaped_file="${z_temp_prefix}${z_aid}_escaped.txt"
291	    z_asteps_file="${z_temp_prefix}${z_aid}_steps.json"
292	
293	    test -f "${z_ascript_path}" || buc_die "About step script not found: ${z_ascript_path}"
294	
295	    buc_log_args "Reading script body for ${z_aid} (skip shebang)"
296	    zrbfc_write_script_body "${z_ascript_path}" "${z_abody_file}" \
297	      || buc_die "Failed to read about step script: ${z_ascript_path}"
298	    z_abody=$(<"${z_abody_file}")
299	    test -n "${z_abody}" || buc_die "Empty about script body: ${z_ascript_path}"
300	
301	    buc_log_args "Baking pinned image refs into script text"
302	    z_abody="${z_abody//\$\{ZRBF_TOOL_SYFT\}/${z_rbfc_tool_syft}}"
303	
304	    case "${z_aentrypoint}" in
305	      bash)    z_ashebang="#!/bin/bash" ;;
306	      sh)      z_ashebang="#!/bin/sh" ;;
307	      python3) z_ashebang="#!/usr/bin/env python3" ;;
308	      *)       buc_die "Unknown entrypoint: ${z_aentrypoint}" ;;
309	    esac
310	    printf '%s\n%s' "${z_ashebang}" "${z_abody}" > "${z_aescaped_file}" \
311	      || buc_die "Failed to write about script body for ${z_aid}"
312	
313	    buc_log_args "Appending about step ${z_aid} to JSON array"
314	    jq \
315	      --arg name "${z_abuilder}" \
316	      --arg id "${z_aid}" \
317	      --rawfile script "${z_aescaped_file}" \
318	      '. + [{name: $name, id: $id, script: $script}]' \
319	      "${z_output_file}" > "${z_asteps_file}" \
320	      || buc_die "Failed to append about step ${z_aid} to JSON"
321	    mv "${z_asteps_file}" "${z_output_file}" \
322	      || buc_die "Failed to update about steps JSON for ${z_aid}"
323	  done
324	}

328	# Reads ZRBFC_RBGJV_STEPS_DIR and z_rbfc_tool_* image refs from module state
329	zrbfc_assemble_vouch_steps() {
330	  zrbfc_sentinel
331	
332	  local -r z_output_file="$1"
333	  local -r z_temp_prefix="$2"

335	  # Step definitions: script|builder|entrypoint|id

348	  local z_ventrypoint=""
349	  local z_vid=""

351	  local z_vbody_file=""

353	  local z_vsteps_file=""
354	  local z_vbody=""
355	  local z_vshebang=""
356

371	
372	    case "${z_ventrypoint}" in
373	      bash)    z_vshebang="#!/bin/bash" ;;
374	      sh)      z_vshebang="#!/bin/sh" ;;
375	      python3) z_vshebang="#!/usr/bin/env python3" ;;
376	      *)       buc_die "Unknown entrypoint: ${z_ventrypoint}" ;;
377	    esac
378	    printf '%s\n%s' "${z_vshebang}" "${z_vbody}" > "${z_vescaped_file}" \
379	      || buc_die "Failed to write vouch script body for ${z_vid}"
380	
381	    buc_log_args "Appending vouch step ${z_vid} to JSON array"
382	    jq \
383	      --arg name "${z_vbuilder}" \
384	      --arg id "${z_vid}" \
385	      --rawfile script "${z_vescaped_file}" \
386	      '. + [{name: $name, id: $id, script: $script}]' \
387	      "${z_output_file}" > "${z_vsteps_file}" \
388	      || buc_die "Failed to append vouch step ${z_vid} to JSON"
389	    mv "${z_vsteps_file}" "${z_output_file}" \
390	      || buc_die "Failed to update vouch steps JSON for ${z_vid}"
391	  done
392	}

394	# Internal: assemble single-step preflight JSON array file
395	# Args: output_file temp_prefix
396	# Reads ZRBFC_RBGJR_STEPS_DIR and z_rbfc_tool_alpine from module state.
397	# Single step prepends to every ordain-path Cloud Build job (conjure, bind,
398	# graft, enshrine) as defense-in-depth: validates reliquary GAR-presence from
399	# the worker pool's vantage before expensive work runs.
400	zrbfc_assemble_preflight_step() {
401	  zrbfc_sentinel
402	
403	  local -r z_output_file="$1"
404	  local -r z_temp_prefix="$2"
405	
406	  local -r z_pscript_path="${ZRBFC_RBGJR_STEPS_DIR}/rbgjr01-reliquary-preflight.sh"
407	  local -r z_pbody_file="${z_temp_prefix}preflight_body.txt"
408	  local -r z_pescaped_file="${z_temp_prefix}preflight_escaped.txt"
409	  local -r z_psteps_file="${z_temp_prefix}preflight_steps.json"
410	
411	  test -f "${z_pscript_path}" || buc_die "Preflight step script not found: ${z_pscript_path}"
412	
413	  buc_log_args "Reading preflight step script (skip shebang)"
414	  zrbfc_write_script_body "${z_pscript_path}" "${z_pbody_file}" \
415	    || buc_die "Failed to read preflight step script: ${z_pscript_path}"
416	  local z_pbody=""
417	  z_pbody=$(<"${z_pbody_file}")
418	  test -n "${z_pbody}" || buc_die "Empty preflight script body"
419	
420	  printf '#!/bin/sh\n%s' "${z_pbody}" > "${z_pescaped_file}" \
421	    || buc_die "Failed to write escaped preflight script body"
422	
423	  echo "[]" > "${z_output_file}" || buc_die "Failed to initialize preflight steps JSON"
424	  jq \
425	    --arg name "${z_rbfc_tool_alpine}" \
426	    --arg id "reliquary-preflight" \
427	    --rawfile script "${z_pescaped_file}" \
428	    '. + [{name: $name, id: $id, script: $script}]' \
429	    "${z_output_file}" > "${z_psteps_file}" \
430	    || buc_die "Failed to build preflight step JSON"
431	  mv "${z_psteps_file}" "${z_output_file}" \
432	    || buc_die "Failed to finalize preflight step JSON"
433	}

435	######################################################################
436	# GAR Package Enumeration (Registry API — shared by tally, rekon, audit, batch_vouch)
437	
438	# Internal: enumerate every <element>/<basename> pair under <subtree-root>/ via GAR REST.
439	# Writes "<element> <basename>" pairs (one per line, sorted) to ZRBFC_PACKAGE_LIST_FILE.
440	# An empty file is a valid result (no elements).
441	# Args: token, subtree_root (e.g., RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT, RBGL_RELIQUARIES_ROOT)
442	# Pagination: pageSize=1000 — deferred until evidence of >1000 packages.
443	zrbfc_list_packages_capture() {
444	  zrbfc_sentinel
445	
446	  local -r z_token="${1:?Token required}"
447	  local -r z_subtree_root="${2:?Subtree root required}"
448	
449	  local -r z_list_url="${ZRBFC_GAR_API_BASE}/${ZRBFC_GAR_PACKAGE_BASE}/packages?pageSize=1000"
450	  local -r z_list_infix="rbfc_list_packages"
451	  local -r z_subtree="${z_subtree_root}/"
452	
453	  rbuh_json "GET" "${z_list_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_list_infix}"
454	  rbuh_require_ok "List GAR packages" "${z_list_infix}"
455	
456	  local -r z_resp_file="${ZRBUH_PREFIX}${z_list_infix}${ZRBUH_POSTFIX_JSON}"
457	  local -r z_raw_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfc_package_list_raw.txt"
458	
459	  # GAR returns package names URL-encoded (slashes as %2F). Decode, strip the
460	  # API path prefix, filter to <subtree>/<element>/<basename> shape
461	  # (length == 2 after split excludes anything deeper or shallower), emit as
462	  # space-separated pair lines.
463	  jq -r --arg subtree "${z_subtree}" '
464	    .packages[]?.name
465	    | sub("^.*/packages/"; "")
466	    | gsub("%2F"; "/")
467	    | select(startswith($subtree))
468	    | ltrimstr($subtree)
469	    | split("/")
470	    | select(length == 2)
471	    | "\(.[0]) \(.[1])"
472	  ' "${z_resp_file}" > "${z_raw_file}" \
473	    || buc_die "Failed to extract GAR package list"
474	
475	  local -r z_sorted_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfc_package_list_sorted.txt"
476	  sort "${z_raw_file}" > "${z_sorted_file}" \
477	    || buc_die "Failed to sort GAR package list"
478	
479	  # Per-package tags.list filter: skip packages with zero live tags. Post-jettison
480	  # walking-dead packages persist in GAR's package container until the depot cleanup
481	  # policy reaps the orphan children on its daily run; filtering at this read site
482	  # decouples display state from GAR's lazy reclamation cadence. See RBSCL / RBSIR.
483	  : > "${ZRBFC_PACKAGE_LIST_FILE}"
484	  local z_element z_basename z_pkg_name z_pkg_encoded z_tag_infix z_tag_count
485	  local -i z_tag_idx=0
486	  while IFS=' ' read -r z_element z_basename; do
487	    test -n "${z_element}" || continue
488	    z_pkg_name="${z_subtree}${z_element}/${z_basename}"
489	    z_pkg_encoded="${z_pkg_name//\//%2F}"
490	    z_tag_infix=$(printf 'rbfc_tags_%04d' "${z_tag_idx}")
491	    z_tag_idx=$((z_tag_idx + 1))
492	    local z_tags_url="${ZRBFC_GAR_API_BASE}/${ZRBFC_GAR_PACKAGE_BASE}/packages/${z_pkg_encoded}/tags?pageSize=1"
493	    rbuh_json "GET" "${z_tags_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_tag_infix}"
494	    rbuh_require_ok "List tags for ${z_pkg_name}" "${z_tag_infix}"
495	    z_tag_count=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "${z_tag_infix}" '(.tags // []) | length') \
496	      || buc_die "Failed to count tags for ${z_pkg_name}"
497	    test "${z_tag_count}" -gt 0 || continue
498	    echo "${z_element} ${z_basename}" >> "${ZRBFC_PACKAGE_LIST_FILE}"
499	  done < "${z_sorted_file}"
500	}
501	
502	# Internal: enumerate every <anchor> directly under <subtree-root>/ via GAR REST.
503	# For 1-deep categories (e.g., enshrinements) where the package itself is
504	# named <anchor> with no further basename. Writes "<anchor>" lines (one per
505	# line, sorted) to ZRBFC_PACKAGE_LIST_FILE. An empty file is a valid result.
506	# Args: token, subtree_root (e.g., RBGL_ENSHRINES_ROOT)
507	# Pagination: pageSize=1000 — deferred until evidence of >1000 packages.
508	zrbfc_list_anchors_capture() {
509	  zrbfc_sentinel
510	
511	  local -r z_token="${1:?Token required}"
512	  local -r z_subtree_root="${2:?Subtree root required}"
513	
514	  local -r z_list_url="${ZRBFC_GAR_API_BASE}/${ZRBFC_GAR_PACKAGE_BASE}/packages?pageSize=1000"
515	  local -r z_list_infix="rbfc_list_anchors"
516	  local -r z_subtree="${z_subtree_root}/"
517	
518	  rbuh_json "GET" "${z_list_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_list_infix}"
519	  rbuh_require_ok "List GAR anchor packages" "${z_list_infix}"
520	
521	  local -r z_resp_file="${ZRBUH_PREFIX}${z_list_infix}${ZRBUH_POSTFIX_JSON}"
522	  local -r z_raw_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfc_anchor_list_raw.txt"
523	
524	  # Filter to <subtree>/<anchor> shape (length == 1 after split excludes
525	  # anything deeper) and emit just the anchor name.
526	  jq -r --arg subtree "${z_subtree}" '
527	    .packages[]?.name
528	    | sub("^.*/packages/"; "")
529	    | gsub("%2F"; "/")
530	    | select(startswith($subtree))
531	    | ltrimstr($subtree)
532	    | split("/")
533	    | select(length == 1)
534	    | .[0]
535	  ' "${z_resp_file}" > "${z_raw_file}" \
536	    || buc_die "Failed to extract GAR anchor package list"
537	
538	  sort "${z_raw_file}" > "${ZRBFC_PACKAGE_LIST_FILE}" \
539	    || buc_die "Failed to sort GAR anchor package list"
540	}

542	######################################################################
543	# GAR Artifact Extraction (Registry API — no docker required)
544	
545	# Internal: extract files from a FROM-scratch artifact in GAR to a local directory.
546	# Handles multi-platform manifest lists by picking the first platform (content is
547	# identical for architecture-independent artifacts like -about and -vouch).
548	# Args: token package tag extract_dir
549	# Returns: 0 if extraction succeeded, 1 if artifact not found in registry.
550	# Infrastructure failures (curl, jq, tar) are fatal via buc_die.
551	zrbfc_gar_extract_artifact() {
552	  zrbfc_sentinel
553	
554	  local -r z_token="$1"
555	  local -r z_package="$2"
556	  local -r z_tag="$3"
557	  local -r z_extract_dir="$4"
558	
559	  local -r z_safe_pkg="${z_package//\//_}"
560	  local -r z_prefix="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/gar_${z_safe_pkg}_${z_tag}_"
561	
562	  # HEAD check — does the artifact exist?
563	  local -r z_head_status="${z_prefix}head_status.txt"
564	  local -r z_head_response="${z_prefix}head_response.txt"
565	  local -r z_head_stderr="${z_prefix}head_stderr.txt"
566	  curl --head -s \
567	    --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
568	    --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
569	    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
570	    -H "Accept: ${ZRBFC_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}" \
571	    -w "%{http_code}" \
572	    -o "${z_head_response}" \
573	    "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_package}/manifests/${z_tag}" \
574	    > "${z_head_status}" 2>"${z_head_stderr}" \
575	    || buc_die "HEAD request failed for ${z_package}:${z_tag} — see ${z_head_stderr}"
576	
577	  local -r z_http_code=$(<"${z_head_status}")
578	  test "${z_http_code}" = "200" || return 1
579	
580	  # GET manifest (may be manifest list/index or single-platform manifest)
581	  local -r z_manifest="${z_prefix}manifest.json"
582	  local -r z_manifest_stderr="${z_prefix}manifest_stderr.txt"
583	  curl -sL \
584	    --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
585	    --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
586	    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
587	    -H "Accept: ${ZRBFC_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}" \
588	    "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_package}/manifests/${z_tag}" \
589	    > "${z_manifest}" 2>"${z_manifest_stderr}" \
590	    || buc_die "GET manifest failed for ${z_package}:${z_tag} — see ${z_manifest_stderr}"
591	
592	  # Resolve to a single-platform manifest
593	  local z_single_manifest="${z_manifest}"
594	  local -r z_media_type_file="${z_prefix}media_type.txt"
595	  jq -r '.mediaType // empty' "${z_manifest}" > "${z_media_type_file}" 2>/dev/null || true
596	  local -r z_media_type=$(<"${z_media_type_file}")
597	
598	  case "${z_media_type}" in
599	    *manifest.list*|*image.index*)
600	      # Multi-platform manifest list — pick first platform's manifest
601	      local -r z_digest_file="${z_prefix}platform_digest.txt"
602	      jq -r '.manifests[0].digest // empty' "${z_manifest}" \
603	        > "${z_digest_file}" 2>/dev/null \
604	        || buc_die "Failed to extract platform digest from manifest list"
605	      local -r z_platform_digest=$(<"${z_digest_file}")
606	      test -n "${z_platform_digest}" || buc_die "Empty platform digest in manifest list"
607	
608	      local -r z_plat_manifest="${z_prefix}plat_manifest.json"
609	      local -r z_plat_stderr="${z_prefix}plat_manifest_stderr.txt"
610	      curl -sL \
611	        --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
612	        --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
613	        -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
614	        -H "Accept: application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v2+json,application/vnd.oci.image.manifest.v1+json" \
615	        "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_package}/manifests/${z_platform_digest}" \
616	        > "${z_plat_manifest}" 2>"${z_plat_stderr}" \
617	        || buc_die "GET platform manifest failed for ${z_package} — see ${z_plat_stderr}"
618	      z_single_manifest="${z_plat_manifest}"
619	      ;;
620	  esac
621	
622	  # Extract all layer digests. Buildkit FROM-scratch images emit one layer per
623	  # COPY instruction (rbgja04's about-image stacks six: sbom, build_info,
624	  # recipe.txt, buildkit_metadata.json, cache_before.json, cache_after.json),
625	  # so a single-layer extract loses everything past the first COPY.
626	  local -r z_layers_file="${z_prefix}layer_digests.txt"
627	  local -r z_layers_stderr="${z_prefix}layer_digests_stderr.txt"
628	  jq -r '.layers[].digest' "${z_single_manifest}" \
629	    > "${z_layers_file}" 2>"${z_layers_stderr}" \
630	    || buc_die "Failed to extract layer digests from manifest — see ${z_layers_stderr}"
631	  test -s "${z_layers_file}" \
632	    || buc_die "No layer digests in manifest for ${z_package}:${z_tag}"
633	
634	  mkdir -p "${z_extract_dir}" || buc_die "Failed to create extraction directory: ${z_extract_dir}"
635	
636	  # Load-then-iterate: file fully consumed and closed before curl/tar run, so
637	  # no child process can silently consume the loop's remaining input.
638	  local z_layer_digests=()
639	  local z_layer_line=""
640	  while IFS= read -r z_layer_line || test -n "${z_layer_line}"; do
641	    z_layer_digests+=("${z_layer_line}")
642	  done < "${z_layers_file}"
643	
644	  # Fetch and extract each layer in manifest order. FROM-scratch COPY layers
645	  # add disjoint files, so accumulation needs no whiteout handling.
646	  local z_layer_digest=""
647	  local z_blob_file=""
648	  local z_blob_stderr=""
649	  local z_tar_stderr=""
650	  local z_layer_idx=0
651	  for z_layer_idx in "${!z_layer_digests[@]}"; do
652	    z_layer_digest="${z_layer_digests[$z_layer_idx]}"
653	    test -n "${z_layer_digest}" || continue
654	    z_blob_file="${z_prefix}blob_${z_layer_idx}.tar.gz"
655	    z_blob_stderr="${z_prefix}blob_${z_layer_idx}_stderr.txt"
656	    curl -sL \
657	      --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
658	      --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
659	      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
660	      "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_package}/blobs/${z_layer_digest}" \
661	      > "${z_blob_file}" 2>"${z_blob_stderr}" \
662	      || buc_die "GET blob failed for ${z_package} layer ${z_layer_digest} — see ${z_blob_stderr}"
663	
664	    z_tar_stderr="${z_prefix}tar_${z_layer_idx}_stderr.txt"
665	    tar -xzf "${z_blob_file}" -C "${z_extract_dir}" 2>"${z_tar_stderr}" \
666	      || buc_die "Failed to extract layer ${z_layer_digest} for ${z_package}:${z_tag} — see ${z_tar_stderr}"
667	  done
668	
669	  return 0
670	}
671	
672	# Resolve a hallmark's vessel by reading the vessel field from its vouch ark.
673	# Authenticates as Retriever, fetches the vouch ark, extracts vouch_summary.json,
674	# and emits the .vessel field. Single home for hallmark→vessel lookup; callers
675	# that need vessel identity for operation prose or logging route through here.
676	# Args: hallmark
677	# Emits: vessel sigil (e.g., "rbev-busybox")
678	rbfc_vessel_for_hallmark_capture() {
679	  zrbfc_sentinel
680	
681	  local -r z_hallmark="${1:?Hallmark required}"
682	
683	  test -f "${RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}" \
684	    || buc_die "Retriever credential not found: ${RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}"
685	  local z_token=""
686	  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}") \
687	    || buc_die "Failed to get Retriever OAuth token"
688	
689	  local -r z_vouch_pkg="${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${z_hallmark}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_VOUCH}"
690	  local -r z_scratch="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfc_vessel_for_hallmark"
691	  rm -rf "${z_scratch}" || buc_die "Failed to clear scratch dir: ${z_scratch}"
692	
693	  zrbfc_gar_extract_artifact "${z_token}" "${z_vouch_pkg}" "${z_hallmark}" "${z_scratch}" \
694	    || buc_die "Hallmark not found: ${z_hallmark} (no vouch ark at ${z_vouch_pkg}:${z_hallmark})"
695	
696	  test -f "${z_scratch}/vouch_summary.json" \
697	    || buc_die "vouch_summary.json not found in vouch ark for ${z_hallmark}"
698	
699	  local -r z_vessel_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfc_vessel_for_hallmark_value.txt"
700	  jq -r '.vessel // empty' "${z_scratch}/vouch_summary.json" > "${z_vessel_file}" \
701	    || buc_die "Failed to read vessel from vouch_summary.json"
702	  local -r z_vessel=$(<"${z_vessel_file}")
703	  test -n "${z_vessel}" || buc_die "Vessel field empty in vouch_summary.json"
704	
705	  printf '%s\n' "${z_vessel}"
706	}

708	######################################################################
709	# Plumb (rbw-fpf / rbw-fpc)
710	
711	# Internal: core plumb logic shared by full and compact modes.
712	# Queries GAR directly via Registry API — no local docker required.
713	# Authenticates as Retriever. Vessel is resolved from the hallmark's vouch ark.
714	# Args: hallmark mode
715	zrbfc_plumb_core() {
716	  zrbfc_sentinel
717	
718	  local -r z_hallmark="${1:-}"
719	  local -r z_mode="${2}"
720	
721	  test -n "${z_hallmark}" || buc_die "Hallmark parameter required"
722	
723	  buc_step "Resolving vessel from vouch ark"
724	  local z_vessel=""
725	  z_vessel=$(rbfc_vessel_for_hallmark_capture "${z_hallmark}") \
726	    || buc_die "Failed to resolve vessel for hallmark: ${z_hallmark}"
727	  buc_info "Resolved hallmark to vessel: ${z_vessel}"
728	
729	  rbfc_require_vessel_sigil "${z_vessel}"
730	
731	  # Load vessel config (sets RBRV_VESSEL_MODE, RBRV_BIND_IMAGE, etc.)
732	  local -r z_vessel_dir="${RBRR_VESSEL_DIR}/${z_vessel}"
733	  zrbfc_load_vessel "${z_vessel_dir}"
734	
735	  buc_step "Authenticating as Retriever"
736	  test -f "${RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}" \
737	    || buc_die "Retriever credential not found: ${RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}"
738	  local z_token=""
739	  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}") \
740	    || buc_die "Failed to get Retriever OAuth token"
741	
742	  local -r z_extract="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/plumb"
743	  mkdir -p "${z_extract}" || buc_die "Failed to create extraction directory"
744	  local z_has_about=false
745	  local z_has_vouch=false
746	
747	  # Fetch about ark from GAR (tag = hallmark)
748	  buc_step "Fetching about ark from GAR"
749	  local -r z_about_pkg="${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${z_hallmark}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ABOUT}"
750	  local -r z_about_dir="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/plumb_about"
751	  if zrbfc_gar_extract_artifact "${z_token}" "${z_about_pkg}" "${z_hallmark}" "${z_about_dir}"; then
752	    z_has_about=true
753	    cp "${z_about_dir}"/* "${z_extract}/" 2>/dev/null || true
754	  fi
755	
756	  # Fetch vouch ark for content (vessel resolution already extracted it once above)
757	  buc_step "Fetching vouch ark from GAR"
758	  local -r z_vouch_pkg="${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${z_hallmark}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_VOUCH}"
759	  local -r z_vouch_dir="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/plumb_vouch"
760	  if zrbfc_gar_extract_artifact "${z_token}" "${z_vouch_pkg}" "${z_hallmark}" "${z_vouch_dir}"; then
761	    z_has_vouch=true
762	    cp "${z_vouch_dir}"/* "${z_extract}/" 2>/dev/null || true
763	  fi
764	
765	  # Bind vessels: fallback to static display if no about ark
766	  if test "${RBRV_VESSEL_MODE}" = "rbnve_bind" && test "${z_has_about}" = "false"; then
767	    zrbfc_plumb_show_bind "${z_vessel}" "${z_hallmark}" "${z_mode}"
768	    return 0
769	  fi
770	
771	  # Require about ark for non-bind vessels
772	  if test "${z_has_about}" = "false"; then
773	    buc_die "About ark not found in GAR: ${z_about_pkg}:${z_hallmark}"
774	  fi
775	
776	  # Display results
777	  if test "${z_mode}" = "compact"; then
778	    zrbfc_plumb_show_compact "${z_vessel}" "${z_hallmark}" "${z_extract}" "${z_has_vouch}"
779	  else
780	    zrbfc_plumb_show_full "${z_vessel}" "${z_hallmark}" "${z_extract}" "${z_has_vouch}"
781	  fi
782	}
783	
784	# Internal: display bind vessel info
785	# Args: vessel hallmark mode
786	zrbfc_plumb_show_bind() {
787	  zrbfc_sentinel
788	
789	  local -r z_vessel="$1"
790	  local -r z_hallmark="$2"
791	  local -r z_mode="$3"
792	
793	  if test "${z_mode}" = "compact"; then
794	    echo ""
795	    echo "=== ${z_vessel} / ${z_hallmark} ==="
796	    echo "  Type: bind | Trust: digest-pin only"
797	    test -n "${RBRV_BIND_IMAGE:-}" && echo "  Source: ${RBRV_BIND_IMAGE}"
798	    echo "  No SLSA provenance, SBOM, or build transcript (not built by GCB)"
799	    echo ""
800	    return 0
801	  fi
802	
803	  echo ""
804	  echo "================================================================"
805	  echo "  HALLMARK PLUMB: ${z_vessel} / ${z_hallmark}"
806	  echo "================================================================"
807	  echo ""
808	  echo "  Vessel type:  BIND (external image pinned by digest)"
809	  echo "  Trust model:  Digest-pin only"
810	  echo ""
811	  test -n "${RBRV_BIND_IMAGE:-}" && echo "  Bind source:  ${RBRV_BIND_IMAGE}"
812	  echo ""
813	  echo "  TRUST BOUNDARY"
814	  echo "  This is a bind vessel. The image was not built by Google Cloud"
815	  echo "  Build. No SLSA provenance, no SBOM, and no build transcript"
816	  echo "  exist because GCB did not produce this image."
817	  echo ""
818	  echo "  Trust is based solely on digest pinning of a known-good"
819	  echo "  external image from its source registry."
820	  echo ""
821	  echo "================================================================"
822	  echo ""
823	}

825	# Internal: shared section rendering used by both compact and full modes
826	# Args: extract_dir has_vouch
827	# Outputs: vessel type, source, builder, SLSA, SBOM summary, vouch results
828	zrbfc_plumb_show_sections() {
829	  zrbfc_sentinel
830	
831	  local -r z_dir="$1"
832	  local -r z_has_vouch="$2"
833	
834	  local -r z_bi="${z_dir}/build_info.json"
835	  local -r z_sbom="${z_dir}/sbom.json"
836	  local -r z_vs="${z_dir}/vouch_summary.json"
837	  local -r z_bkmeta="${z_dir}/buildkit_metadata.json"
838	
839	  # Determine vessel mode from build_info.json
840	  local z_vessel_mode="rbnve_conjure"
841	  if test -f "${z_bi}"; then
842	    local z_mode_raw
843	    jq -r '.mode // "rbnve_conjure"' "${z_bi}" > "${ZRBFC_SCRATCH_FILE}" 2>/dev/null \
844	      || echo "rbnve_conjure" > "${ZRBFC_SCRATCH_FILE}"
845	    z_mode_raw=$(<"${ZRBFC_SCRATCH_FILE}")
846	    z_vessel_mode="${z_mode_raw}"
847	  fi
848	
849	  if test -f "${z_bi}" && test "${z_vessel_mode}" = "rbnve_bind"; then
850	    # ── Bind vessel sections ──────────────────────────────────────────
851	    # Batch extract bind fields from build_info.json
852	    local z_bi_moniker="" z_bi_source_img="" z_bi_mirror_ts="" z_bi_hallmark=""
853	    local z_bi_image_uri="" z_bi_git_repo="" z_bi_git_branch="" z_bi_git_commit=""
854	    jq -r '
855	      (.moniker // "?"),
856	      (.source.image_ref // "?"),
857	      (.build.inscribe_timestamp // "?"),
858	      (.build.hallmark // "?"),
859	      (.image.uri // "?"),
860	      (.git.repo // "?"),
861	      (.git.branch // "?"),
862	      (.git.commit // "?")
863	    ' "${z_bi}" > "${ZRBFC_SCRATCH_FILE}" 2>/dev/null || true
864	    { read -r z_bi_moniker
865	      read -r z_bi_source_img
866	      read -r z_bi_mirror_ts
867	      read -r z_bi_hallmark
868	      read -r z_bi_image_uri
869	      read -r z_bi_git_repo
870	      read -r z_bi_git_branch
871	      read -r z_bi_git_commit
872	    } < "${ZRBFC_SCRATCH_FILE}"
873	
874	    echo ""
875	    echo "  -- Vessel Type -------------------------------------------------"
876	    echo "  How this image was produced."
877	    echo ""
878	    echo "  Mode:           bind (upstream image mirrored to GAR)"
879	    echo "  Moniker:        ${z_bi_moniker}"
880	
881	    echo ""
882	    echo "  -- Upstream Source -----------------------------------------------"
883	    echo "  The digest-pinned upstream image that was mirrored."
884	    echo ""
885	    echo "  Source image:   ${z_bi_source_img}"
886	    echo "  Trust model:    digest-pin (image identity is the digest itself)"
887	
888	    echo ""
889	    echo "  -- Mirror -------------------------------------------------------"
890	    echo "  When the image was mirrored from upstream into GAR."
891	    echo ""
892	    echo "  Mirror time:    ${z_bi_mirror_ts}"
893	    echo "  Hallmark:   ${z_bi_hallmark}"
894	    echo "  Image URI:      ${z_bi_image_uri}"
895	
896	    echo ""
897	    echo "  -- Git Context --------------------------------------------------"
898	    echo "  The repository state when the mirror operation was performed."
899	    echo ""
900	    echo "  Repository:     ${z_bi_git_repo}"
901	    echo "  Branch:         ${z_bi_git_branch}"
902	    echo "  Commit:         ${z_bi_git_commit}"
903	
904	    echo ""
905	    echo "  -- Trust --------------------------------------------------------"
906	    echo "  Bind vessels are NOT built by Cloud Build. Trust comes from the"
907	    echo "  digest pin in rbrv.env — the image is exactly the bytes specified."
908	    echo ""
909	    echo "  SLSA provenance:  not applicable (no build step)"
910	    echo "  Verification:     image digest matches the pin in the vessel definition"
911	
912	  elif test -f "${z_bi}"; then
913	    # ── Conjure vessel sections ───────────────────────────────────────
914	    # Batch extract conjure fields from build_info.json
915	    local z_platform="" z_qemu="" z_cj_moniker=""
916	    local z_cj_git_repo="" z_cj_git_branch="" z_cj_git_commit=""
917	    local z_cj_build_id="" z_cj_build_ts="" z_cj_inscribe_ts="" z_cj_image_uri=""
918	    local z_slsa_level="" z_slsa_invocation="" z_slsa_builder=""
919	    jq -r '
920	      (.platform // "unknown"),
921	      (.qemu_used // "false"),
922	      (.moniker // "?"),
923	      (.git.repo // "?"),
924	      (.git.branch // "?"),
925	      (.git.commit // "?"),
926	      (.build.build_id // "?"),
927	      (.build.timestamp // "?"),
928	      (.build.inscribe_timestamp // "?"),
929	      (.image.uri // "?"),
930	      (.slsa.build_level // "?"),
931	      (.slsa.build_invocation_id // "?"),
932	      (.slsa.provenance_builder_id // "?")
933	    ' "${z_bi}" > "${ZRBFC_SCRATCH_FILE}" 2>/dev/null || true
934	    { read -r z_platform
935	      read -r z_qemu
936	      read -r z_cj_moniker
937	      read -r z_cj_git_repo
938	      read -r z_cj_git_branch
939	      read -r z_cj_git_commit
940	      read -r z_cj_build_id
941	      read -r z_cj_build_ts
942	      read -r z_cj_inscribe_ts
943	      read -r z_cj_image_uri
944	      read -r z_slsa_level
945	      read -r z_slsa_invocation
946	      read -r z_slsa_builder
947	    } < "${ZRBFC_SCRATCH_FILE}"
948	
949	    echo ""
950	    echo "  -- Vessel Type -------------------------------------------------"
951	    echo "  How this image was produced and for which CPU architecture."
952	    echo ""
953	    echo "  Mode:           conjure (built by Google Cloud Build)"
954	    local z_strategy="native"
955	    if test "${z_qemu}" = "true"; then z_strategy="emulated (QEMU)"; fi
956	    echo "  Platform:       ${z_platform} (host-platform view)"
957	    echo "  Build strategy: ${z_strategy}"
958	    echo "  Moniker:        ${z_cj_moniker}"
959	
960	    echo ""
961	    echo "  -- Source -------------------------------------------------------"
962	    echo "  The git repository, branch, and commit that produced this build."
963	    echo ""
964	    echo "  Repository:     ${z_cj_git_repo}"
965	    echo "  Branch:         ${z_cj_git_branch}"
966	    echo "  Commit:         ${z_cj_git_commit}"
967	
968	    echo ""
969	    echo "  -- Builder ------------------------------------------------------"
970	    echo "  The Cloud Build job that executed this build, with timestamps."
971	    echo ""
972	    echo "  Build ID:       ${z_cj_build_id}"
973	    echo "  Build time:     ${z_cj_build_ts}"
974	    echo "  Inscribe time:  ${z_cj_inscribe_ts}"
975	    echo "  Image URI:      ${z_cj_image_uri}"
976	
977	    echo ""
978	    echo "  -- SLSA Provenance ----------------------------------------------"
979	    echo "  Cryptographic proof linking this exact image digest to its build."
980	    echo ""
981	    echo "  Build level:    ${z_slsa_level}"
982	    echo "  Invocation ID:  ${z_slsa_invocation}"
983	    echo "  Builder ID:     ${z_slsa_builder}"
984	    echo "  Predicate types:"
985	    jq -r '.slsa.provenance_predicate_types[]?' "${z_bi}" 2>/dev/null | while IFS= read -r z_pt; do
986	      echo "                    ${z_pt}"
987	    done
988	
989	    echo ""
990	    echo "  SLSA Build L${z_slsa_level} attests:"
991	    echo "    + This digest was produced by this Cloud Build invocation"
992	    echo "    + From this source repo and commit"
993	    echo "    + On Google's hosted builder (tamper-resistant environment)"
994	    echo ""
995	    echo "  SLSA Build L${z_slsa_level} does NOT attest:"
996	    echo "    - Base image security or supply chain"
997	    echo "    - Package integrity within the image"
998	    echo "    - Absence of vulnerabilities"
999	    echo "    - Correctness or security of the Dockerfile"
1000	  else
1001	    echo ""
1002	    echo "  build_info.json not found in -about artifact"
1003	  fi
1004	
1005	  # Base image section — conjure only (bind has no Dockerfile)
1006	  if test "${z_vessel_mode}" != "rbnve_bind"; then
1007	    echo ""
1008	    echo "  -- Base Image ---------------------------------------------------"
1009	    echo "  The upstream image this build started FROM and the OS syft detected."
1010	    echo ""
1011	    local -r z_recipe="${z_dir}/recipe.txt"
1012	    if test -f "${z_recipe}"; then
1013	      local z_from_line=""
1014	      local z_recipe_line
1015	      while IFS= read -r z_recipe_line; do
1016	        case "${z_recipe_line}" in [Ff][Rr][Oo][Mm]\ *) z_from_line="${z_recipe_line}"; break ;; esac
1017	      done < "${z_recipe}" 2>/dev/null
1018	      if test -n "${z_from_line}"; then
1019	        echo "  Dockerfile FROM: ${z_from_line#FROM }"
1020	      fi
1021	    fi
1022	    if test -f "${z_sbom}"; then
1023	      local z_distro_name="" z_distro_ver=""
1024	      jq -r '(.distro.name // empty), (.distro.version // empty)' "${z_sbom}" \
1025	        > "${ZRBFC_SCRATCH_FILE}" 2>/dev/null || true
1026	      { read -r z_distro_name; read -r z_distro_ver; } < "${ZRBFC_SCRATCH_FILE}"
1027	      if test -n "${z_distro_name}"; then
1028	        echo "  Detected distro: ${z_distro_name} ${z_distro_ver}"
